items.title: Jito jumps 12% after JIP-38 buyback proposal – Can JTO reach $0.80?
items.whyYouShouldCare: Jito's buyback proposal could enhance liquidity and investor confidence, potentially influencing JTO's price trajectory and overall market sentiment.

items.title: Allbridge Pauses Cross-Chain Protocol After $1.65M Flash Loan Attack
items.whyYouShouldCare: Allbridge's pause following a significant exploit raises concerns over cross-chain security, which could impact user trust and liquidity in Solana's ecosystem.

items.title: Cross-chain protocol Allbridge halts after $1.65 million flash loan exploit
items.whyYouShouldCare: The halt of Allbridge's operations due to a flash loan attack highlights vulnerabilities in cross-chain protocols, potentially affecting Solana's integration and usage across platforms.
